description: Focuses on the *kind* of sound. Disruptive noises are those that interfere with focus or communication, while ambient sounds are background noises that don't necessarily cause disturbance.
positive: The jackhammer’s pounding vibrated through my teeth, a jarring, insistent *rumore*.
My ears stung with the sudden shriek of the air brake, a truly disruptive *sonido*.
A piercing whistle cut through the air, making my chest tighten with discomfort – *bruit*.
The insistent clatter of construction tools felt like a physical assault on my skull – *Lärm*.
The metallic screech of the grinder resonated in my jaw, a painfully disruptive *sonido*.
A sudden, high-pitched alarm triggered a visceral reaction, a sharp, jarring *rumore*.
The incessant hammering made my temples throb with a disruptive *sonido*.
The grinding, scraping sound felt like it was boring into my eardrums - *bruit*.
A chainsaw’s roar sent a tremor through my ribcage, a truly disruptive *Lärm*.
The piercing siren sent a jolt through my shoulders, a harsh, disruptive *sonido*.
The hammering resonated in my sinuses, a painful, disruptive *rumore*.
That sudden, loud clang made my entire body flinch – a very disruptive *bruit*.
The drill's piercing whine caused a pressure in my head - a disturbing *Lärm*.
A sharp, metallic clang reverberated through my bones, a disruptive *sonido*.
The jarring clang sent a shockwave through my neck, a truly disruptive *rumore*.
The insistent buzzing felt like it was vibrating within my teeth - *bruit*.
The hammering’s percussive force felt like it was shaking my inner ear – *Lärm*.
